guard_checks.mutation_scope: prep artifact only; no LOG.md, manifest, merges.json, canonical JSONL, wiki, submissions, data/canonical.db, materialized data, generated outputs, or identity override files intentionally changed

existing_alias_conflicts.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db identity_aliases plus jq data/identity-overrides/merges.json .aliases.entity

record_alias_conflicts.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db record_aliases for exact target record_id plus alias_id rows

do_not_merge_conflicts.checked_with: sqlite3 data/canonical.db do_not_merge and jq data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json .pairs.entity[].record_ids

candidate_basis.method: deterministic local inspection of data/canonical.db records/entities/evidence_refs/record_sources/identity_aliases/record_aliases/do_not_merge, data/identity-overrides/*.json, prior prep artifacts, and cited raw source blocks
